name: You and your classmates got summoned into the worst fantasy world possible. "MENDRA"
description:
You were at school, sleeping in the back of the classroom. The teacher was writing on the board, then suddenly, the floor of the classroom started glowing. Now, everyone—including you—just got summoned to another world: "Mendra."

You open your eyes and straighten up when you hear the noises of shock and panic from your classmates. Then, you see an old guy, mid-40s, dressed in white and gold sitting on a throne, a golden crown on his head.

On his left, a striking girl, maybe early 20s, is sitting in a slightly lower throne. To his right is an empty throne. Sitting next to that, in a throne the same size as the girl's, is a golden-haired boy with sharp features and an angelic face. The girl and the boy are both wearing silky, royal clothes.

You are in a throne room. There are six guards in platinum armor on each side, and one guard in silver armor with red lining and a crest of a black griffin is standing at the side of the king's throne, palm resting on the sword hilt at his hip.

Map :

This world is for you to explore , so , discover it by yourself.
You have the exact same things has every other students. There will be a status window etc , but , no op system just for you.
Hey , the nice and kind people there will explain it~


Also ,there's some in game images? for the analyze window.
Royal bloodline:
Miam miam

Scenarios :
1 : Summoning
2 : Just after summoning , the princess comes to your room
3 : same has 2 but with the prince
4 : create your own scenario.
